case_title: MARCO MARINI VS. SCOTT HOLLEY et al

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARINI, MARCO AS TO DEFENDANT HOLLEY, SCOTT DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR NOV-28-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-01-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-13-2012
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARINI, MARCO AS TO DEFENDANT HOLLEY, SCOTT
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $445.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT HOLLEY, SCOTT
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-28-2012 CONTINUED TO JAN-16-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-16-2013 CONTINUED TO APR-17-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR PLAONTOFF TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARINI, MARCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOLLEY, SCOTT $21,035.23 PRINCIPAL, $445.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $21,480.23, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-17-2013 CONTINUED TO AUG-14-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF MARINI, MARCO AS TO DEFENDANT HOLLEY, SCOTT
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-14-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR, JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
